titleStmt.title: Letter from R.F. Tobin to the Under Secretary, 3 August, 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: R.F. Tobin

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: A letter from R.F. Tobin, H.M. Inspector of Anatomy for Ireland, to Sir Robert Chalmers (1858-1938). Tobin is submitting Returns as of 30 June in accordance with the Academy Act.Sir Robert Chalmers was sent to Ireland as replacement under-secretary for Sir Matthew Nathan (1862-1939), who had resigned along with Augustine Birrell (1850-1933), his chief secretary, following the outbreak of the Easter Rising in 1916.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary's Office Registered Papers, CSO RP/1916/5620/13343

correspAction.placeName: Office of HM Inspector of Anatomy, 60 Stephens Green, Dublin, Ireland.

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Office H M's Inspector of Anatomy, 60 Stephens Green, Dublin. 3 rd August 1916 The Under Secretary, Dublin Castle. Sir, I have the honour to forward hereâ
with in conformity with the Anatomy
Act the Returns for the period ending 30 th June 1916. I have the honour to be, Sir,
Your obedient servant R F Tobin H M's Inspector of Anatomy
Ireland. I Ack. (Chief Secy)
II
3.8.16
On His Majesty's Service. The Under Secretary, Dublin Castle.
